name: taxvault
description: Release hardening and browser smoke tests for the Tax Vault static app.

scripts.check: npm run check:web-js && npm run lint:web-js && npm run test:web-unit && npm run audit:web-deps && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo clippy --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p taxvault-wasm -- -D warnings && cargo audit && cargo test --workspace && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && python3 scripts/verify_tax_table.py --check && npm run test:web-smoke
scripts.check:web-js: node --check web/app.js && for f in web/modules/*.js; do node --check "$f"; done
scripts.lint:web-js: eslint web/app.js web/modules/*.js tests/playwright/smoke.spec.js playwright.config.js tests/unit/**/*.test.mjs
